scope_includes: sliding glass door assembly and installation
unloading and handling of all windows and doors

takeoff_rules.method: count by type — no SF or LF calculations needed
takeoff_rules.brand_note: Brand from schedule affects difficulty — Anderson, Pella, Marvin etc.

commercial_multifamily.sliding_door_note: Minimum $250 each — assembly required (e.g. Anderson doors)

handling_charges.note: Unloading and handling to install location
handling_charges.status: market test — adjust based on feedback

mobilization.reason: Subs handle their own logistics — no gas or toll charge on this trade
